queries.sql: SELECT `p`.*, `c`.`name` as `category_name`, `c`.`slug` as `category_slug`, (SELECT pm.path FROM product_media pm WHERE pm.product_id = p.id AND pm.is_cover = 1 LIMIT 1) as cover_image FROM `products` `p` LEFT JOIN `categories` `c` ON `c`.`id` = `p`.`category_id` WHERE `p`.`is_active` = 1 AND `p`.`deleted_at` IS NULL AND `p`.`is_best_seller` = 1 ORDER BY `p`.`created_at` DESC LIMIT 24
SELECT DISTINCT colour FROM products WHERE colour IS NOT NULL AND colour != '' AND is_active = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY colour ASC
